title: The Disaster at Balanjar
description: It was transmitted to me in writing by al-Sari --Shu'ayb-SayfMuhammad and Talhah: 'Uthman wrote to Said ordering Salman to attack al-Bab. ('Uthmin) wrote also to 'Abd al-Rahman b. Rabi'ah, who was in command at al-Bab: "Verily greed and arrogance have made many of the subjects (ra'iyyah) reckless. Curtail (your campaign ] and do not plunge ahead with the Muslims so boldly, for I fear they may face severe trials." But this [letter) did not restrain 'Abd al-Rahmin from his goal and he would not stop short of Balanjar.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
